name: analyzer-panel
description: AnalyzerPanel is reusable for both source and destination sides of the Transform tab. Provides type selector (CSV/JSON/API/PostgreSQL/Supabase), renders the input form, calls the API, and shows CompactSummary with schema selector for multi-schema contracts.

name: mapping-editor
description: MappingEditor is destination-centric: every destination field gets a row. Source dropdown offers unmapped, NULL, constant value, separator, then source fields. Amber warning for unmapped non-nullable destination fields. Constraint badges (PK/FK/UQ/NOT NULL).

name: shared-badges
description: badges.tsx exports ConstraintBadge (PK, FK, UQ, NOT NULL, CHECK) and TypeBadge (integer, text, boolean, timestamp, uuid, json). Uses oklch colors. Reused across DataContractDisplay, MappingEditor, and CompactSummary.

content: Per-panel error handling with dismissable error banners. RawJSON toggle on all contract displays.
Excel uses DataContractDisplay (not ContractDisplay) since excelcontract returns DataContract with one SchemaContract per sheet, not a flat SourceContract.

name: llm-settings
description: LLMSettings is a collapsible panel with provider/model/API key inputs. State lives in TransformTab, passed as LLMConfig prop. Collapsed by default, shows status badge when configured. Provider change resets model to first option.

content: AI Suggest merge preserves user_edited rows and appends any the AI response omitted. user_edited is set to true in updateMapping (MappingEditor) whenever the user changes any field.

name: transform-inputs
description: TransformInputs is an extracted component that manages local text state for the source_fields comma-separated input. Parses to string[] on blur, not on every keystroke, to avoid cursor/value fighting. Same dismiss pattern as constant input (× button → unmapped).

title: Multi-source/dest Transform tab decomposition
rationale: TransformTab decomposed into SourceList, DestinationList, MappingEditor orchestrated by TransformTab. Each DestEntry holds its own mappings and verifyResult. Async handlers capture targetDestId at call time to avoid stale closures. Source dropdown uses REF_DELIM (null byte) to encode ref+field in option values, avoiding colon collision with user labels.

name: source-list
description: SourceList manages an array of SourceEntry objects. Each entry wraps an AnalyzerPanel with add/remove/rename. Labels are auto-derived from contract names on analysis.

name: destination-list
description: DestinationList manages an array of DestEntry objects. Same pattern as SourceList but each entry also holds mappings[] and verifyResult for per-destination state.

title: Multi-schema selection via checkboxes
rationale: Replaced single-schema dropdown with checkbox list for multi-schema contracts. Users can check multiple schemas from one connection. SourceEntry/DestEntry use selectedSchemaIndices: number[]. DestEntry stores mappingsBySchema keyed by schema index. TransformTab flattens checked schemas into source groups and derives destination tabs. getSchemaName/schemaRef helpers centralize ref derivation.

name: e2e-tests
description: Playwright e2e tests in e2e/ directory. Run with pnpm test:e2e. Requires local API server on port 8080. Config uses NEXT_PUBLIC_DATA_INGESTION_API_URL env var to point at localhost. Petstore multi-schema test verifies source preference scoring.

name: pipeline-tab
description: PipelineTab uses @xyflow/react (v12) for the DAG canvas. Steps are the source of truth; nodes/edges are derived via syncNodes/syncEdges. StepFlowNode type extends Node<StepNodeData>. handleDeleteStep uses setSteps functional updater with queueMicrotask for sync to avoid stale closures. onConnect only updates depends_on; syncEdges rebuilds edges.

title: Text-based data flow steps instead of DAG pipeline
rationale: Reverted the reactflow DAG canvas approach. Multi-step data flow is described as structured annotations on each destination mapping group: execution_order, pre_steps (manual_label, llm_classify, lookup), post_steps (capture_response), and notes. This extends the Transform tab instead of adding a separate Pipeline tab.

title: Unified step list model
rationale: All step types (mapping, manual_label, llm_classify, lookup, capture_response) are equal peers in an ordered list. Each step has input_ref and output_ref for chaining. Mapping step embeds the full MappingEditor. Field dropdowns resolve from input_ref with cycle-safe resolution. Replaced the old pre_steps/post_steps/execution_order model.

name: ai-pipeline-plan
description: AI Build Pipeline calls POST /api/v1/ai-pipeline-plan with source/dest contracts and existing user-created steps. Per-destination button in DataFlowSteps, global button in TransformTab. user_created flag tracks manually added/edited steps (pinned badge). AI-generated steps get crypto.randomUUID IDs.

title: Flat pipeline model with ConnectionList
rationale: Replaced per-destination step tabs with a single flat pipeline. SourceList + DestinationList merged into ConnectionList with role dropdown. Send is now an explicit step type. PipelineContract has flat steps array with multiple inputs and named outputs. TransformTab reduced from 750 to 280 lines, net -625 lines.
